---
pagetitle: "KDSC | Community Data Lab"
toc: false
css: project_style.css
listing:
  - id: project-list
    contents: "project/projects/*.qmd"
    template: project_listing.ejs
    filter-ui: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="cdl-description">
                <div class="cdl-header">
                    <h2 >How the Community Data Lab Works</h2>
                     <p>We connect real-world challenges with student-led data inquiry to generate insights and impact for our community.</p>
                </div>

                <div class="cdl-steps">
                    <div class="step-partner">
                        <div class="icon"><i class="bi bi-people-fill"></i></div>
                        <h3>1. Partner & Problem</h3>
                        <p>We collaborate with community partners to identify a pressing question or problem that can be explored with data.</p>
                    </div>

                    <div class="step-data">
                        <div class="icon"><i class="bi bi-clipboard-data-fill"></i></div>
                        <h3>2. Data & Analysis</h3>
                        <p>Students work in small groups to analyze relevant datasets, applying data science methods to uncover patterns and insights.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="step-insight">
                         <div class="icon"><i class="bi bi-lightbulb-fill"></i></div>
                        <h3>3. Insights & Impact</h3>
                        <p>The findings, materials, and datasets are shared back with the partner and the public to drive decisions and learning.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
</div>

<div class = "project-header"> 
  <h2> Explore Our CDL Projects </h2>
</div>

<div class="filter-container">
    <div class="filter-grid">
        <!-- Filter 1: Data Type -->
        <div class="filter-box">
            <label for="filterDataType" class="form-label fw-bold">By Data Type</label>
            <select id="filterDataType" class="form-select">
                <option value="all" selected>All Data Types</option>
            </select>
        </div>
        <!-- Filter 2: Data Category -->
        <div class="filter-box">
            <label for="filterCategory" class="form-label fw-bold">By Data Category</label>
            <select id="filterCategory" class="form-select">
                <option value="all" selected>All Categories</option>
            </select>
        </div>
        <!-- Filter 3: Keyword -->
        <div class="filter-box">
            <label for="filterKeyword" class="form-label fw-bold">By Keyword</label>
            <div class="input-group">
                <span class="input-group-text"><i class="bi bi-search"></i></span>
                <input type="text" id="filterKeyword" class="form-control" placeholder="e.g., 'Child Care'">
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

::: {#project-list}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
    // Wait for Quarto's listing to potentially load first
    setTimeout(enableCustomFilters, 100); 
});

function enableCustomFilters() {
    const dataTypeFilter = document.getElementById('filterDataType');
    const categoryFilter = document.getElementById('filterCategory');
    const keywordFilter = document.getElementById('filterKeyword');
    const projectList = document.querySelector('#listing-project-list .item-list');

    if (!projectList) return;

    const projectCards = Array.from(projectList.querySelectorAll('.item-card'));
    const noResultsMessage = document.querySelector('.listing-no-matching');

    function populateFilters() {
        const dataTypes = new Set();
        const categories = new Set();

        projectCards.forEach(card => {
            (card.dataset.datatype || '').split(',').forEach(t => t.trim() && dataTypes.add(t.trim()));
            (card.dataset.datacategory || '').split(',').forEach(c => c.trim() && categories.add(c.trim()));
        });

        const addOptions = (selectElement, optionsSet) => {
            Array.from(optionsSet).sort().forEach(option => {
                const newOption = document.createElement('option');
                newOption.value = option;
                newOption.textContent = option;
                selectElement.appendChild(newOption);
            });
        };

        addOptions(dataTypeFilter, dataTypes);
        addOptions(categoryFilter, categories);
    }

    const runFilter = () => {
        const selectedDataType = dataTypeFilter.value;
        const selectedCategory = categoryFilter.value;
        const keyword = keywordFilter.value.toLowerCase().trim();
        let visibleCount = 0;

        projectCards.forEach(card => {
            const fullCardText = card.textContent.toLowerCase();
            const keywordMatch = keyword === '' || fullCardText.includes(keyword);

            const cardDataTypes = (card.dataset.datatype || '').split(',').map(s => s.trim());
            const cardCategories = (card.dataset.datacategory || '').split(',').map(s => s.trim());

            const dataTypeMatch = selectedDataType === 'all' || cardDataTypes.includes(selectedDataType);
            const categoryMatch = selectedCategory === 'all' || cardCategories.includes(selectedCategory);

            if (dataTypeMatch && categoryMatch && keywordMatch) {
                card.style.display = 'block';
                visibleCount++;
            } else {
                card.style.display = 'none';
            }
        });

        if (noResultsMessage) {
            noResultsMessage.style.display = visibleCount === 0 ? 'block' : 'none';
        }
    };

    populateFilters();
    runFilter();

    dataTypeFilter.addEventListener('change', runFilter);
    categoryFilter.addEventListener('change', runFilter);
    keywordFilter.addEventListener('input', runFilter);
}
</script>
```
